steps.name: the request status changes to "In Progress"
the system marks the manager's validation as TRUE
the user is authenticated

elements.name: User is not authorized to approve the leave request

steps.name: the leave request status is "Pending"
the user is not in the approval chain
the user attempts to approve the leave request
the system displays the error You are not authorized to modify the status of this request.
the user is authenticated

elements.name: User tries to approve a request that is not in a valid state

steps.name: the leave request status is "Granted"
the user is in the approval chain
the user attempts to approve the leave request
the system displays the error If the request is not in a valid state ("Pending" or "In Progress"), validation is blocked.
the user is authenticated

elements.name: User tries to approve a request they have already previously approved

steps.name: the leave request status is "Pending"
the user is in the approval chain
the user has previously approved the request
the user attempts to approve the leave request
the system displays the error If the user has already validated previously, the validation is refused.

name: Approve Leave Request
description: As an Administrator or Team Lead, I want to approve an employee's leave request, so that I can officially validate their absence according to the defined approval chain.
